title: when / while / as + S + V（時間子句）

formulas.zh: 當…時候/雖然…時/當…邊…，主句動作發生
主句動作 + 當…時候/雖然…時/當…邊…

explanation: 時間副詞子句用來表達兩個動作的時間關係。when表特定時間點或條件；while強調兩動作同時進行，主要搭配進行式；as表動作同步發生或漸進變化。時間副詞子句可置於句首或句末。置於句首時，主句前加逗號；置於句末時無逗號。注意：while有時表「雖然、儘管」的轉折意義，需由上下文判斷。

examples.eng: When I arrived at school, the bell was ringing loudly.
examples.chi: 當我到達學校時，鐘聲正在響起。

examples.eng: While the students were studying, the teacher was grading papers.
examples.chi: 當學生在唸書時，老師正在批改試卷。

examples.eng: As she grew older, she became more independent and confident.
examples.chi: 隨著年齡增長，她變得越來越獨立且自信。

examples.eng: As soon as you finish your homework, you can play video games.
examples.chi: 一旦你完成功課，你就可以玩電動遊戲。

extension.tip: 判斷使用哪個連接詞的要點：when用於單一時間點或普遍情況，while強調時間段內的同步動作（通常兩者都用進行式），as表「當…的同時」或「隨著…變化」。留意while有轉折意義時（意為「雖然」），主句後才有真正意涵。

examples.test: When I saw her, she _____ (talk) on the phone.
examples.result: → was talking（過去進行式，表看到時她正在做的動作，強調進行中）

examples.test: While I _____ (do) homework, my brother _____ (watch) TV.
examples.result: → was doing / was watching（兩個同時進行的進行式動作）
→ advances / changes（漸進變化，兩者共同進展，可用簡單式表達流程）

extension.note: when看時間點、while看同進行、as看漸變化——三者各有其時間層次之分。

exercises.sentence: When the students started the exam, they felt very nervous.
exercises.translation: 當學生開始考試時，他們感到非常緊張。

exercises.sentence: While I was reading a book, my friend knocked on the door.
exercises.translation: 當我在看書時，我的朋友敲門了。

parts: older, her dream of becoming a doctor
exercises.sentence: As she grew older, her dream of becoming a doctor became clearer.
exercises.translation: 隨著年紀增長，她成為醫生的夢想變得越來越清楚。

exercises.sentence: As soon as you arrive home, please send me a message.
exercises.translation: 一旦你到家，請立即傳訊息給我。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的時間連接詞完成句子，表示兩個動作的時間關係
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ I got home, my mother was cooking dinner.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。When 用來表示特定時間點的到達，後接簡單過去式 (got)，主句用過去進行式 (was cooking) 表示動作正在進行中。B項 while 強調兩動作同時進行，通常兩句都用進行式。C項 as 表動作同步發生但語氣較生硬。D項 since 表因果關係，不符題意。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 填空選擇，強調兩個動作同時進行的情境
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ the children were playing in the park, their parents were sitting on the bench watching them.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 B。While 強調兩個動作同時進行，搭配過去進行式 (were playing / were sitting)。A項 when 也可用但語氣不如 while 強調同時性。C項 during 是介詞需搭配名詞。D項 before 表先後順序，不符情境。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇合適的連接詞，表示漸進變化的過程
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ she read more books, her vocabulary became increasingly rich and diverse.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C。As 表示兩個動作或狀態逐漸同步發生或變化，符合「讀越多書，詞彙越豐富」的漸進關係。A項 when 通常指特定時間點。B項 while 強調同時進行但不表漸進。D項 whenever 表「每當」，多指重複發生，不符句意。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷句型正確性，識別時間副詞子句的位置與標點用法
mc_exercises.question_eng: Which sentence is grammatically correct? A) While he was studying hard for the exam, his friends were having fun. B) While he was studying hard for the exam his friends were having fun. C) His friends were having fun while he was studying hard for the exam. D) While he was studying hard for the exam; his friends were having fun.

options.text: While he was studying hard for the exam, his friends were having fun.
While he was studying hard for the exam his friends were having fun.
His friends were having fun while he was studying hard for the exam.
While he was studying hard for the exam; his friends were having fun.

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A 和 C 都語法正確，但選項中 A 正確示範了時間副詞子句置於句首時須加逗號。B 選項缺少逗號，違反規則。C 選項也正確但時間子句置於句末，可無逗號。D 項使用分號不當。A 展現標準句首時間子句的正確標點用法。
